overall.description: Third-person gameplay footage from The Witcher 3 featuring Geralt of Rivia walking along a scenic lakeside dirt path. The clip showcases high-quality rendered graphics with warm autumn lighting, rocky terrain, and natural wilderness surroundings.

agents.ego_description: Geralt walking steadily along the dirt path with two swords strapped to his back, moving away from the camera

entered.detail: calm lake surface reflecting morning light, visible beyond the path's edge
large moss-covered rock formation lining the right side of the trail
worn earth trail with scattered stones winding through the landscape
tall bare tree with twisted branches standing beside the path
bushes with yellow and orange foliage indicating fall season

segments.scene_description: Geralt walks along an open dirt trail beside a calm lake, with morning sunlight casting long shadows across the path. A rocky cliff wall runs along the right side while autumn-colored shrubs and scattered trees populate the landscape.

scene_state.functional_zone: winding forest trail with rocky outcrops

events.description: path curves gently right moving into a more enclosed area with denser tree cover overhead

agents.ego_description: Geralt continues walking as the trail curves slightly to the right, navigating the winding path along the rocky hillside

entered.detail: prominent boulder formation emerging from the grassy terrain on the left

segments.scene_description: The trail curves right into a more enclosed passage with the rocky cliff wall now closer on the right. The lake view fades into the distance as the path winds through denser autumn vegetation, with large rock outcrops appearing on the left side of the trail.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement along a lakeside trail that gradually transitions from an open vista into a more enclosed rocky passage. It begins with Geralt walking along a wide dirt path beside a calm lake, where morning sunlight casts long shadows across autumn-colored shrubs and a distant cliff wall. As the trail curves to the right, the expansive view of the water fades into the distance and the rocky cliff on the right draws closer to the path. The scene then shifts into a denser stretch of autumn vegetation, with large rock outcrops emerging on the left to frame the winding trail.
